rationale: The response explicitly arbitrates the premise: it accepts the long-term direction that AI will improve QA, but blocks the irreversible organizational action of dissolving QA now. It downgrades the action into QA transformation, AI-assisted testing adoption, measurement over 1-2 quarters, and gradual adjustment based on defect escape, automation coverage, incidents, and delivery metrics. This is not method stacking or simple agreement/disagreement.
